candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales related and cannot be clearly attributed to the selected COGS bucket 'Purchased Goods and Services'. Conservatively avoid adding it to COGS.
Standalone D&A component, but not identified as COGS-related and likely part of the broader D&A disclosure rather than a separate COGS-only add-on.
Standalone D&A component, but not identified as COGS-related and likely part of the broader D&A disclosure rather than a separate COGS-only add-on.
Appears disclosure-like and has no visible operating values here; also not clearly tied to COGS.

variables.notes: The selected COGS bucket is only 'Purchased Goods and Services'. No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines but are not attributable specifically to COGS, so no separate COGS_DA row should be added.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary line at the same level as the selected overhead rows. Since XSGA_COMPONENTS were selected from Personnel Costs, External Costs, and Other Operating Expenses and explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization, this summary D&A row should be added separately to capture operating overhead D&A without double counting components.
Component of the broader D&A disclosure. Do not use when the summary row 'Depreciation and Amortization' is available.
Component of the broader D&A disclosure. Do not use when the summary row 'Depreciation and Amortization' is available.
Appears non-operative/disclosure-like here and is not needed because a clearer D&A summary row exists.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A summary row is visible above operating income and sits alongside, not within, the selected XSGA component rows. Per the summary-vs-components rule, use only the summary row and not its components.
